title: CheckHacksV2
description:
This Mod adds Anti Meteor Anti Wurst Anti Freecam Anti Baritone and more.
There wont be any updates for spitgot/paper for the next time.
body:
MeteorModlistDetector
A lightweight and reliable Paper/Spigot plugin (1.21+) that automatically detects players using the Meteor Client by analyzing their plugin message behavior.

⭐ Overview
MeteorModlistDetector identifies Meteor Client users by exploiting a known detection vector:
The translations exploit on signs
This method is extremely accurate, lightweight, and produces no false positives against normal Fabric users.

🔍 Features
Accurate Meteor Client detection  
Detects Meteor users based on suppressed plugin messages — no heuristics, no guessing.

Zero false positives for legitimate Fabric clients  
Uses a protocol‑level behavior that only Meteor triggers.

Configurable punishment system  
Choose between:

Kick

Temporary ban

Permanent ban

Fully customizable messages  
Supports color codes and formatting for kick/ban messages.

Debug mode  
Logs all received plugin message channels for advanced analysis.

Lightweight & fast  
Minimal overhead, designed for high‑performance Paper servers.

📦 Requirements
Paper / Spigot / Folia 1.21+

Java 21+

PacketEvents 2.11+ (Paper/Spigot/Folia only)
